name: HWR_PRFL_CTL_SRC_METRIC
description: The profile control source metric table stores the metric info.

columns.Name: PRFL_ID
columns.Comments: The profile ID for this metric.

columns.Name: TYPE_OF_RECORD
columns.Comments: Type indicating the type of the post-control record

columns.Name: CONTROL_KEY
columns.Comments: The control type key for this metric.

columns.Name: SOURCE_TYPE_ID
columns.Comments: The id of source type for this metric.

columns.Name: SCORE_VALUE
columns.Comments: The score value for score metric.

columns.Name: POST_COUNT
columns.Comments: The number of post counted for compliance summary metric.

columns.Name: ISSUE_COUNT
columns.Comments: The number of issue counted for compliance summary metric.

columns.Name: GLOBAL_PERCENTILE
columns.Comments: The global percentile for score metric.

columns.Name: LOCAL_PERCENTILE
columns.Comments: The local percentile for score metric.

columns.Name: METRIC_DATE
columns.Comments: The date this metric was recorded.

columns.Name: METRIC_ATTRIBUTE_1
columns.Comments: This column is to contain Metric Attribute 1.

columns.Name: METRIC_ATTRIBUTE_2
columns.Comments: This column is to contain Metric Attribute 2.

columns.Name: METRIC_ATTRIBUTE_3
columns.Comments: This column is to contain Metric Attribute 3.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
